inputs.label: Tank Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the fish tank in meters.

inputs.label: Tank Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the fish tank in meters.

inputs.label: Water Depth
inputs.businessContext: Depth of water in the tank in meters.

inputs.label: Average Fish Length
inputs.businessContext: Average length of fish in centimeters.

inputs.label: Condition Factor (K)
inputs.businessContext: Condition factor for weight-length relationship. Typical range 0.01-0.03.

inputs.label: Stocking Density
inputs.businessContext: Desired stocking density in kg per cubic meter.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Safety factor to reduce stocking from theoretical maximum (0-1).
